title: Earnings call transcript: Bionano Genomics Q1 2026 shows revenue growth
text: Bionano Genomics Q1 2026 earnings call on May 13, 2026 showed revenue growth despite modest headline miss. Key discussion points: Q1 2026 revenue $6.7M up 4% YoY, consumables revenue $3.9M up 20% YoY, flow cell sales 8,178 units up 17% YoY, gross margin 49% vs 46% prior year, operating expense management with adjusted OpEx at $9.1M. Management highlighted positive momentum: increasing utilization among installed base, strong reimbursement developments (47% CPT 81195 rate increase), new CPT 81354 code activation, continued publication of clinical evidence. Q2 2026 guidance $7.5-7.8M, full-year guidance $30-33M. CEO emphasized the health of the business with engaged installed base and positive utilization trends. Analyst questions focused on path to profitability, debt retirement, software adoption rates, and competitive positioning.
